title: Pre-operative anesthesia assessment
source_review_basis: full authoritative documents inspected and archived; item-level retain/rewrite/remove/add comparisons recorded

assessment.text: Supports previous-anesthesia history, medical therapy, focused examination, airway and physical-condition assessment, and factors affecting perioperative risk.

source.title: Basic Standards for Preanesthesia Care
source.population: Patients receiving anesthesia care, with emergency modification permitted.
source.exclusions: Exact for record review, patient interview, focused examination, previous anesthesia and medical therapy, risk-relevant physical condition, tests, consultations, consent, and documentation. UAE policy and emergency modifications remain local responsibilities.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports previous-anesthesia history, medical therapy, focused examination, airway and physical-condition assessment, and factors affecting perioperative risk.

assessment.text: Supports previous-anesthesia history, medical therapy, focused examination, airway and physical-condition assessment, and factors affecting perioperative risk.
assessment.rationale: The ASA standard supports documenting previous anesthesia and medical therapy plus focused airway and physical-condition examination.

assessment.text: Supports clinician-selected tests or consultations, consent for anesthesia care, and recording the assessment in the medical record.
assessment.rationale: The standard supports recording clinician-selected tests, consultations, consent, and the completed assessment without generating them.
